PPR FOR ALL FLIGHTS WITHIN AND OUTSIDE AD OPERATING HOURS.
PPR-REQUESTS SHALL BE SUBMITTED KRN.PPR(AT)SWEDAVIA.SE AND MUST 
INCLUDE A VALID SANCTIONS CERTIFICATE. 
WWW.SWEDAVIA.NET/KIRUNA/ANSOK-OCH-BESTALL/ANSOK-OCH-BESTALL/SANKTIONS
CERTIFIKAT
PROCESSING TIME FOR PPR REQUESTS IS UP TO 36 HOURS AND IS PERFORMED 
DURING AD OPERATOR HOURS ONLY. FOLLOWING TFC IS EXEMPTED REGARDING 
PPR OUT OF SANCTIONS CERTIFICATE HOSP, STATE, SAR, SKED TFC, SWEDISH 
MIL AND OPERATORS WITH SIGNED SANCTIONS COMPLIANCE UNDERTAKING. 
OPERATORS SHALL ENSURE COMPLIANCE WITH ALL PUBLISHED PPR 
REQUIREMENTS AND OBTAIN PPR WHERE APPLICABLE.
FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH PPR REQUIREMENTS, INCLUDING SUBMISSION OF A 
VALID SANCTIONS CERTIFICATE, WILL RESULT IN THE AIRCRAFT BEING 
DIRECTED TO A SEPARATE STAND FOR VERIFICATION AND POSSIBLE POLICE 
NOTIFICATION UPON SUSPICION OF SANCTIONS BREACH. AN ADDITIONAL 
HANDLING CHARGE OF SEK 1,500 WILL APPLY. BY OPERATING THE AIRPORT 
THE OPERATOR AGREES THAT THIS CHARGE MAY BE APPLIED. AN INCIDENT 
REPORT WILL BE SUBMITTED TO THE SWEDISH CIVIL AVIATION AUTHORITY.

DEPARTURE PLANNING INFORMATION MSG (A-DPI AND C-DPI) PROVIDED TO 
NETWORK MANAGER OPERATIONS CENTER (NMOC).
1.1. ADS-B DATA REQUIRED
1.1.1. FOR ADS-B DATA USED BY THE AD OPERATOR AND EUROCONTROL, 
PILOTS OF AIRCRAFT EQUIPPED WITH MODE S AND ADS-B FUNCTIONALITY 
MUST, WHEN OPERATING ON THE GROUND:
A) SELECT AUTOMATIC MODE AND THE ASSIGNED MODE A, OR
B) IF AUTOMATIC MODE IS NOT AVAILABLE, SELECT ON AND THE ASSIGNED 
MODE A:
- FROM THE REQUEST OF PUSH-BACK.
- AFTER LANDING, UNTIL THE AIRCRAFT HAS STOPPED ON HIS STAND.
- WHEN THE AIRCRAFT IS FULLY PARKED, THE PILOT SHALL SELECT STBY.
1.1.2. WHEN THE AIRCRAFT IS CAPABLE OF COMMUNICATING ITS 
IDENTIFICATION (I.E. THE CALLSIGN USED IN FLIGHT), THIS MUST BE 
ENTERED (VIA THE FMS OR TRANSPONDER CONTROL PANEL) AT THE TIME OF 
THE PUSH-BACK REQUEST.
1.1.3. THE CREW MUST USE THE FORMAT DEFINED BY ICAO TO ENTER THE 
AIRCRAFT IDENTIFICATION.
1.1.4. IN ORDER NOT TO COMPROMISE THE PERFORMANCE OF SYSTEMS BASED 
ON SSR FREQUENCIES (INCLUDING AIRBORNE TCAS AND SSR RADARS), TCAS 
SHOULD NOT BE SELECTED BEFORE RECEIVING CLEARANCE TO LINE UP, AND 
SHOULD BE DESELECTED AFTER VACATING THE RUNWAY.

PPR FOR ALL FLIGHTS WITHIN AND OUTSIDE AD OPERATING HOURS. 
PPR-REQUESTS SHALL BE SUBMITTED TO VBY.GROUNDHANDLING(AT)SWEDAVIA.SE 
AND MUST INCLUDE A VALID SANCTIONS CERTIFICATE. PROCESSING TIME FOR 
PPR REQUESTS IS UP TO 36 HOURS AND IS PERFORMED DURING AD OPERATOR 
HOURS ONLY. TEMPLATE FOR SANCTIONS CERTIFICATE CAN BE FOUND AT 
WWW.SWEDAVIA.NET/VISBY-AIRPORT/ANSOK-OCH-BESTALL/
 THE FOLLOWING TFC IS EXEMPTED REGARDING PPR OUT OF SANCTIONS 
CERTIFICATE HOSP, STATE, SAR, SKED TFC, SWEDISH MIL AND OPERATORS 
WITH SIGNED SANCTIONS COMPLIANCE UNDERTAKING.
OPERATORS SHALL ENSURE COMPLIANCE WITH ALL PUBLISHED PPR 
REQUIREMENTS AND OBTAIN PPR WHERE APPLICABLE. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH 
PPR REQUIREMENTS, INCLUDING SUBMISSION OF A VALID SANCTIONS 
CERTIFICATE, WILL RESULT IN THE AIRCRAFT BEING DIRECTED TO A 
SEPARATE STAND FOR VERIFICATION AND POSSIBLE POLICE 
NOTIFICATION UPON SUSPICION OF SANCTIONS BREACH. AN ADDITIONAL 
HANDLING CHARGE OF SEK 1,500 WILL APPLY. BY OPERATING THE AIRPORT 
THE OPERATOR AGREES THAT THIS CHARGE MAY BE APPLIED. AN INCIDENT 
REPORT WILL BE SUBMITTED TO THE SWEDISH CIVIL AVIATION AUTHORITY.
